message:
test(baseline): add 6 E2E integration tests for SEC-3.2 baseline modeling (bd-153pv)

Validates deterministic baseline generation, multi-capability profiles,
adversarial drift detection, Markov transition anomaly flagging, artifact
JSON roundtrip, and structured JSONL schema compliance. All tests use
real ExtensionManager with RuntimeRiskConfig and dispatch_host_call_shared.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
